this kind of work.
The native will be married in his 30th year. The native's wife will be a
lady of good fortune, intellect and education.

IMPORTANT CHARTS 169
From his 30th year, the native will experience progressing
fortune. During his 34th year, there will be a slight change in his
profession. Between 37 and 39, the native will meet obstacles in
earning money. His wife will pass through a very dangerous period.
During his 39th year, the native will take up a new profession.
He will get a high position and reputation. He will enj oy the luxury
of possessing vehicles. Between his 41st and 44th year, the native
will possess lands and a house. The last good period in his life
will be between 40 and 54 years. He will have a son and a daughter.
He will live upto the age of 70 or 71 . In addition to having a
wife the native will also keep a mistress: One of the native's
brothers will get good fortune and prosperity from the age of 34.
CHART 246
